object.name: Tropical Palm Tree
object.description: Large mature tropical palm tree, single straight trunk approximately 6-8 meters tall, full crown of long arching fronds. Florida/California species. PBR textured bark and fronds.

evidence.notes: Two large mature palms visible on left and right sides of the casita. Dominant landscape feature.

object.image_edit_prompt: A single large tropical palm tree, isolated on pure white background, full tree visible from base to crown tip, photorealistic, PBR ready, no shadows, centered composition, 4K detail
